name: Auto DM Funnel — New Follower / Comment Trigger
description: Sends a personalised Gumroad DM whenever a new follower is gained or a keyword comment is detected on TikTok or Instagram.

triggers.label: A keyword comment is posted on any of your TikTok videos
A keyword comment is posted on any of your Instagram posts

actions.name: Send DM with Gumroad Link
actions.description: Immediately send a friendly DM to the user who triggered the event
actions.message_template: Hey {{trigger.user.username}} 👋 Thanks for the love! Here's the free AI PDF toolkit I mentioned — grab it here: {{env.GUMROAD_PRODUCT_URL}} 🚀 Let me know if you have questions!

actions.name: Add to Email Follow-up List
actions.description: If the user provided an email (e.g. from a Gumroad purchase), add them to the drip sequence

environment_variables.MAILCHIMP_LIST_ID: ID of your Mailchimp audience list
